untranslatable_reason: This signal requires fundamental ratio-based portfolio construction (book-to-market decile ranking and formation) which is not supported by the allowed price/technical indicators. The signal requires: (1) calculation of book_to_market_ratio from balance sheet data, (2) cross-sectional ranking across all stocks, (3) decile portfolio formation, and (4) annual rebalancing logic. These operations fall outside the scope of single-stock technical indicator conditions and require a separate fundamental data layer and portfolio-level backtesting framework.
translation_notes: SSRN_227016_15 is a classic Fama-French value factor strategy based on Lakonishok et al. (1991). Implementation requires: formation_frequency=annual, formation_month=April, holding_period_years=5, decile_count=10, metric=book_to_market_ratio. Annual rebalancing at end of April. This is a cross-sectional, multi-asset portfolio strategy, not a single-stock technical signal.
